About

Amar Hospital

Welcome to Amar Hospital: The Best Hospital in Patiala, Punjab

At Amar Hospital, we take pride in being recognized as the best hospital in Patiala, Punjab. Our unwavering commitment to providing top-notch medical care and advanced healthcare services has earned us a trusted reputation across the region. Whether you need routine care or specialized treatment, our experienced medical professionals at Amar Hospital Patiala Punjab are here to offer compassionate and expert care.

Salient Features of Amar Hospital

  • Highly Qualified Doctors
  • Latest Medical Equipment
  • Fully Computerized Health Records
  • 24-Hour Emergency Services
  • Clean and Comfortable Facilities
  • Regular Educational and Health Camps
VIEW MORE
CONTACT US
OPD TIMINGS

MULTI-SPECIALTY SERVICES

Known for our expertise. Chosen for our care

We understand that cure and care run hand in hand and thereby put in our best not only as professionals but also as humans.

Anaesthesia & Intensive Care

Our mission is to deliver state-of-the-art, excellent anaesthesia services, pain management and intensive care in the perioperative setting.

 

VIEW MORE

 

Cardiology

Amar Hospital is known for providing comprehensive diagnostic and therapeutic services. Using the latest monitoring systems that provide dedicated round the clock care to treat the patients with heart attacks during the emergency.

 

VIEW MORE

 

Cardiothoracic & Vascular Surgery

This department deals with various procedures related to cardiac, thoracic and vascular disorders.

 

VIEW MORE

 

Endocrinology

Department of Endocrinology offersholistic approach to diagnosis, treatment and management of Diabetes and otherEndocrine disorders related to organs.

 

VIEW MORE

 

ENT

The ENT department at Amar Hospital provides all services related to Ear, Nose and Throat like routine OPD, IPD and Emergency services.

 

VIEW MORE

 

Gastroenterology

The experienced team of doctors and highly trained staff at Department of Gastroenterology & Hepatology offers round-the-clock services in the diagnosis and treatment.

 

VIEW MORE

 

General Surgery

The General and Minimal Access Surgery service is manned 24/7 by an experienced and dedicated team of doctors. The department is committed to providing ethical and evidence based surgical options to our patients.

 

VIEW MORE

 

Infertility Clinic & IVF

Amar Hospital is well equipped with all the latest technology and knowledge regarding all the conditions and cures of Infertility. After the consultation and test reports, our experts will explain you the best solution including IVF.

 

VIEW MORE

 

Laboratory

The Laboratory conducts tests 24×7 with the help of sophisticated equipments and automated analyzer. Laboratory follows strict Quality Control measures. It participates in both External and Internal Quality Progress. Microbiologist is actively involved in Infection Control Activities.

 

VIEW MORE

 

Nephrology

Amar hospital has a dedicated unit with the most advanced dialysis machines and offers round the clock service with facility for Continuous Renal Replacement Therapy (CRRT) for hemo-dynamically unstable patients and Continuous Ambulatory Peritoneal Dialysis.

 

VIEW MORE

 

Neurology

There are interventional neurological procedures, which are used for treatment of acute stroke or epilepsy and are practiced abroad very routinely. We hope to increase awareness on stroke and its prevention so that the focus is on prevention rather than cure.

 

VIEW MORE

 

Neurosurgery

Amar Hospital has a dedicated team ofneuro-surgeons and neuro-anesthetists who provide specialized treatment to neurosurgery patients and it is further matched by a dedicated ICU which is again manned by dedicated and qualifiedcritical care specialists.

 

VIEW MORE

 

Obstetrics and Gynaecology

The Department provides comprehensive services ranging from health promotion to clinical excellence in maternity and gynaecology. We deliver compassionate world-class care with the latest technology in a family centered environment.

 

VIEW MORE

 

Oncology

The department works with an aim to deliver the highest quality care to patients with provision of individualized, personalized approach to every patient as we at Amar Hospital understand the inconvenience and burden for cancer patients and their family members.

 

VIEW MORE

 

Orthopaedics

Amar Hospital uses the best implants available for all its patients. The post surgery care is ensured by encouraging communication and care by team of expert physiotherapists and appropriate pain management to make your recovery smooth and rapid.

 

VIEW MORE

 

Paedetrics and Neonatology

The Department is supported by expert doctors, trained nurses and well-equipped ICU with ventilators, monitors phototherapy units etc providing care for premature and full term infants and actually ill children.

 

VIEW MORE

 

Physiotherapy

We have qualified and highly experienced team of physiotherapists providing OPD Services and IPD Services with treatment procedures of international standards to offer a multifaceted approach to the patient’s rehabilitation.

 

VIEW MORE

 

Plastic Surgery

The department under one roof offers state of art tertiary level care in all disciplines of Plastic Surgery which include Cosmetic Surgery and various branches of Reconstructive Surgery.

 

VIEW MORE

 

Pulmonology

The department provides an active patient care service in the following areas: Clinical Pulmonology, Asthma-Allergy, Interventional Pulmonology, Pulmonary function testing and Sleep Disorders Unit.

 

VIEW MORE

 

Radiology

Department of Radiology and imaging sciences offers a wide variety of diagnostic radiology examinations and interventional procedures with state-of-the-art technology.

 

VIEW MORE

 

Urology

Amar Hospital has a very versatile Urology practice where all urological conditions, from reproductive problems in male patients to urinary issues in either sex is addressed. Our skilled specialists treat most urological complaints.

 

VIEW MORE

 

MULTI-SPECIALTY SERVICES

Known for our expertise. Chosen for our care

We understand that cure and care run hand in hand and thereby put in our best not only as professionals but also as humans.

Nephrology

Amar hospital has a dedicated unit with the most advanced dialysis machines and offers round the clock service with facility for Continuous Renal Replacement Therapy (CRRT) for hemo-dynamically unstable patients and Continuous Ambulatory Peritoneal Dialysis.

Neurology

There are interventional neurological procedures, which are used for treatment of acute stroke or epilepsy and are practiced abroad very routinely. We hope to increase awareness on stroke and its prevention so that the focus is on prevention rather than cure.

VIEW MORE

Neurosurgery

Amar Hospital has a dedicated team ofneuro-surgeons and neuro-anesthetists who provide specialized treatment to neurosurgery patients and it is further matched by a dedicated ICU which is again manned by dedicated and qualifiedcritical care specialists.

The Department provides comprehensive services ranging from health promotion to clinical excellence in maternity and gynaecology. We deliver compassionate world-class care with the latest technology in a family centered environment.

The department works with an aim to deliver the highest quality care to patients with provision of individualized, personalized approach to every patient as we at Amar Hospital understand the inconvenience and burden for cancer patients and their family members.

Amar Hospital uses the best implants available for all its patients. The post surgery care is ensured by encouraging communication and care by team of expert physiotherapists and appropriate pain management to make your recovery smooth and rapid.

VIEW MORE

Paedetrics and Neonatology

The Department is supported by expert doctors, trained nurses and well equipped ICU with ventilators, monitors phototherapy units etc providing care for premature and full term infants and actually ill children.

Physiotherapy

We have qualified and highly experienced team of physiotherapists providing OPD Services and IPD Services with treatment procedures of international standards to offer a multifaceted approach to the patient’s rehabilitation

Plastic Surgery

The department under one roof offers state of art tertiary level care in all disciplines of Plastic Surgery which include Cosmetic Surgery and various branches of Reconstructive Surgery.

VIEW MORE

Pulmonology

The department provides an active patient care service in the following areas: Clinical Pulmonology, Asthma-Allergy, Interventional Pulmonology, Pulmonary function testing and Sleep Disorders Unit.

VIEW MORE

Radiology

Department of Radiology and imaging sciences offers a wide variety of diagnostic radiology examinations and interventional procedures with state-of-the-art technology.

VIEW MORE

Urology

Amar Hospital has a very versatile Urology practice where all urological conditions, from reproductive problems in male patients to urinary issues in either sex is addressed. Our skilled specialists treat most urological complaints.

APPOINTMENT
SEE HOW WE CAN HELP

CLIENTS

Happy Patients-
Our Mission

Our team of experts work together to provide exactly the care you need. We are bound to provide the culture of respect and teamwork, refined diagnosis, coordinated staff, effective treatment and best opinion.

VIEW MORE DETAILS

Mr. Ajaib Singh (Barnala)

Patient
Our patient was admitted to Amar Hospital with a diagnosis of Anterior Wall MI and underwent Coronary Angiography which revealed Coronary Artery Disease and was advised Early PTCA+ stent to LAD. Our patient underwent successful Angioplasty without any complications. We are highly thankful to Amar Hospital, admitting Consultant (Dr. Vivek Singla) and the hospital staff for the assistance which they have provided to us and highly appreciate the hospital for its services and care. Amar Hospital went out of its comfort level and helped the patient right from the beginning till the time of discharge.

Rekha Sharma (Patiala)

Patient
I am one of the happy patients of Amar Hospital. I got admitted for Knee Replacement in Amar Hospital. Many people suggested us for bigger institutes of the region but after reaching Amar Hospital, we were provided homely atmosphere. Consultants and Staff were excellent. Anaesthesia department helped us a lot during and after the Operation. Physiotherapists assisted us to start walking on day two after the operation. Amar Hospital is really a blessing for our region. We really appreciate Dr Amarjot Bahia’s administrative efforts and wish him good luck to take this hospital to new heights.

Shanti Kundra

Patient
Great co workers, really good environment and excellent patient care. They are continuously innovating themselves which is why they remain a premier dental clinic.This was the cleanest medical establishment I've ever been in. They just loved the welcoming and warm atmosphere in there.

Members on our panel

We are always on the look out of good insurance institutions to include them in our network. We would like to avail your services to serve people better. We thanked our prestigious members of empanelment.

0175-2222002/03
